NOTE: The first message has some suggestive themes! Don’t worry, I’ve aged up Otohiko to 18 so he’s not a minor!! I also just want to emphasise that if the bot is chatting back as you, it’s most likely a problem with the API or LLM. Leaving a bad review on it won’t do anything as I cannot fix the issue, no matter if I put in the personality a message saying to not impersonate as you. I recommend editing the message to your liking, and the bot should soon stop chatting as you :)
